recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
recommendations.overview: The Bride unwaveringly continues on her roaring rampage of revenge against the band of assassins who had tried to kill her and her unborn child. She visits each of her former associates one-by-one, checking off the victims on her Death List Five unti

recommendations.title: ThanksKilling
recommendations.overview: A homicidal turkey axes off college kids during Thanksgiving break.

recommendations.title: Good Manners
recommendations.overview: Clara, a lonely nurse from the outskirts of São Paulo, is hired by mysterious and wealthy Ana as the nanny for her unborn child. The two women develop a strong bond, but soon Clara discovers a terrifying secret about the child.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street: The Dream Child
recommendations.overview: The pregnant Alice finds Freddy Krueger striking through the sleeping mind of her unborn child, hoping to be reborn into the real world.

recommendations.title: The Offering
recommendations.overview: In the wake of a young Jewish girl’s disappearance, the son of a Hasidic funeral director returns home with his pregnant wife in hopes of reconciling with his father. Little do they know that directly beneath them in the family morgue, an ancient evi

recommendations.title: Strange but True
recommendations.overview: A woman surprises the family of her deceased boyfriend by telling them she's pregnant with his child.

recommendations.title: At Midnight I'll Take Your Soul
recommendations.overview: Zé do Caixão is an undertaker in a small Brazilian town, searching for the perfect woman to bear him a superior child. Unable to conceive with his wife, he kills her and sets out to find someone else.

recommendations.title: Anything for Jackson
recommendations.overview: A bereaved Satanist couple kidnap a pregnant woman so they can use an ancient spellbook to put their dead grandson's spirit into her unborn child, but they end up summoning more than they bargained for.
